This page is protected to prevent harmful edits. Contact an administrator if you want to suggest changes to the page.

If you think this page should be unprotected, then use {{unprotect}} on the talk page.

Shields are defensive equipment primarily used by Knights to reduce incoming damage. Paladins may also equip shields when using throwing weapons such as Assassin Stars to balance offense and defense. For Sorcerers and Druids, the typical alternative is a Spellbook, though in certain situations—especially when facing strong melee opponents—using a shield can provide superior protection. Monks generally do not use shields, as all of their fist weapons require both hands to wield effectively.

Equipping a shield enables the user to block a portion of incoming attacks from creatures or other players, which in turn increases their Shielding skill over time.

Shields[]
